message:
🐛 Fix marketplace remove not clearing sidebar entry (#831)

The remove handler was looking up sidebar items using the backend UUID
(from getInstalledDashboardId), but sidebar entries are created with the
marketplace slug as the href. This mismatch meant the sidebar entry was
never found and never removed.

Fix: Use marketplace item.id (slug) for sidebar href lookup, matching
how entries are created during install. Also clean up localStorage cards
on remove and remove unused getInstalledDashboardId import.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
